content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule with atom indices labeled. Looking at atom C:18 (carbon with index 18), I can see its direct connections:

- Atom C:17 (carbon, index 17) - connected to C:18
- Atom C:19 (carbon, index 19) - connected to C:18  
- Atom H:22 (hydrogen, index 22) - connected to C:18

From the image, I can confirm these three atoms are covalently bonded to atom 18. The molecule appears to be in geometry configuration 8154, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_8154.xyz".

The neighbor atoms of atom 18 (C) are:
- Atomic index 17, element C
- Atomic index 19, element C  
- Atomic index 22, element H

Geomconf_index: 8154

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 18, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
